dialogos.texto_en: Wow! We can see the ocean from this park!
So, the park stretches along the whole coast right?
This place is famous for Churaumi Aquarium,\nbut it seems like there are many other facilities too.
Let's see, there's a sea turtle exhibit,\na manatee exhibit...\nand there's also a greenhouse and botanical garden.
That's not quite what I imagine when I think of the word 'park.'
Plus, it's really huge.\nI wonder how long it takes\nto walk from one end to the other?
Well, according to the guide,\nthe area is equivalent to\nfifteen Tokyo Domes put together.
Ahaha...\nthat's so big, I can't even imagine it.
It's more like a theme park than a park.
Then, we won't be able to see everything in one day.\nIt's probably better to prioritize what we want to see.
I definitely want to go to the Churaumi Aquarium!
Me too, I don't want to miss the aquarium!
Everyone's probably thinking the same thing, right?\nLet's all roam freely and go explore for a bit,\nand then we can all go to the aquarium together.
Now, when is Futaro-kun going to make his move?
